sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says late readiness can change after frozen ingress but does not serialize the resume behavior.
decisionTaken: Keep the frozen capture and normalized submission, append a superseding SubmissionIngressRecord with the new safety_usable readiness ref, and promote exactly once through the canonical backbone.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The frozen evidence remains immutable while the latest readiness authority can lawfully unblock promotion.
operationalRisk: Promoting without a superseding ingress would hide why a previously pending phone lineage became promotable.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If readiness can downgrade after promotion, route through the prompt 194 assimilation and re-safety path.
